seo.title: Solutions Auto Repair | Trusted Auto Mechanic in Dallas, TX | (214) 360-0488
seo.description: Solutions Auto Repair is your go-to auto mechanic in Dallas, TX. We offer expert diagnostics, brake repair, engine service, and more. Call (214) 360-0488 today!

hero.headline: Expert Auto Repair You Can Count On
hero.subheadline: From diagnostics to major repairs, our certified technicians keep your vehicle running smoothly.

featureSections.title: Full-Service Auto Repair in Dallas
featureSections.body: We handle everything from routine oil changes to complex engine overhauls. Our state-of-the-art diagnostic equipment ensures accurate repairs the first time.
featureSections.cardBody: Every repair is backed by our satisfaction guarantee, so you can drive with confidence.

featureSections.title: Honest Service, Fair Prices
featureSections.body: We believe in clear communication and upfront estimates. No hidden fees, no unnecessary repairs — just honest, reliable service.
featureSections.cardBody: Most repairs come with a 12-month/12,000-mile warranty for your peace of mind.

whyChooseUs.title: Certified Technicians
whyChooseUs.description: Our team holds ASE certifications and undergoes continuous training to stay current with the latest automotive technology.

whyChooseUs.title: Fast Turnaround
whyChooseUs.description: We respect your time. Most repairs are completed the same day, and we offer shuttle service to keep you moving.

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: You'll receive a detailed estimate before any work begins. No surprises, ever.

whyChooseUs.title: Customer Satisfaction
whyChooseUs.description: We measure our success by your satisfaction. Our high repeat customer rate speaks for itself.

testimonials.quote: I brought my SUV in for a check engine light and they diagnosed it quickly. Fair price and great communication.

cta.headline: Ready to Get Your Car Back on the Road?
cta.subheadline: Call us or schedule online for fast, professional service.

servicesPage.intro: At Solutions Auto Repair, we offer a full range of automotive services to keep your vehicle performing at its best. From routine maintenance to major repairs, our certified technicians have you covered.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Accurate diagnostics and expert engine repair to restore performance.
services.longDescription: Our advanced diagnostic equipment quickly identifies issues, from check engine lights to performance problems. We then provide thorough, effective repairs using quality parts.
benefits: Restored engine performance and fuel efficiency

process.title: Diagnostic Scan
process.description: We connect your vehicle to our advanced diagnostic system to retrieve error codes and data.

process.title: Inspection & Report
process.description: Our technician inspects the relevant systems and provides a detailed report with repair options.

process.title: Repair & Test
process.description: Once approved, we perform the repair and test drive to ensure everything is working perfectly.

faqs.question: How long does an engine diagnostic take?
faqs.answer: Most diagnostics take about an hour. More complex issues may require additional time.

faqs.question: Do you use OEM parts?
faqs.answer: We use high-quality OEM or equivalent aftermarket parts, depending on your preference and budget.

services.title: Brake Service
services.shortDescription: Complete brake inspection, repair, and replacement for safety.
services.longDescription: Your brakes are critical for safety. We inspect pads, rotors, calipers, and fluid to ensure reliable stopping power. We'll recommend repairs only when needed.
benefits: Free brake inspection with any service

process.title: Brake Inspection
process.description: We check pad thickness, rotor condition, caliper function, and fluid level.

process.title: Recommendation
process.description: We explain what needs attention and provide a clear estimate.

process.title: Service & Test
process.description: We replace worn components, bleed fluid if needed, and test the brakes thoroughly.

faqs.question: How often should I get my brakes checked?
faqs.answer: We recommend a brake inspection every 10,000 miles or at least once a year.

faqs.question: What are signs of brake problems?
faqs.answer: Squealing, grinding, pulsation, or a soft brake pedal are common signs. If you notice any, bring your car in promptly.

services.title: Oil Change & Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Regular oil changes and preventive maintenance to keep your car healthy.
services.longDescription: Routine oil changes are the best way to protect your engine. We also offer multi-point inspections to catch small issues before they become big problems.

process.title: Oil Drain & Filter Change
process.description: We drain old oil, replace the filter, and refill with the recommended oil grade.

process.title: Multi-Point Inspection
process.description: We check belts, hoses, fluids, tires, and lights to identify any concerns.

process.title: Report & Recommendations
process.description: You receive a full report with photos and any suggested future services.

faqs.question: What type of oil do you use?
faqs.answer: We use conventional, synthetic blend, or full synthetic oil based on your vehicle's requirements.

faqs.question: How often should I change my oil?
faqs.answer: Typically every 3,000-5,000 miles for conventional oil, or up to 7,500 miles for synthetic. Check your owner's manual.

services.title: AC & Heating Repair
services.shortDescription: Keep your cabin comfortable with professional HVAC service.
services.longDescription: A malfunctioning AC or heater can make driving miserable. We diagnose and repair all HVAC components, from compressors to blower motors, to restore comfort.

process.title: System Inspection
process.description: We check refrigerant pressure, compressor operation, and airflow.

process.title: Diagnostic Test
process.description: We identify leaks, electrical issues, or mechanical failures using specialized tools.

process.title: Repair & Recharge
process.description: We repair the issue and recharge the system to manufacturer specifications.

faqs.question: Why is my AC blowing warm air?
faqs.answer: Common causes include low refrigerant, a faulty compressor, or an electrical issue. We'll diagnose the exact cause.

faqs.question: Can you fix heater problems too?
faqs.answer: Yes, we service both AC and heating systems, including heater cores, blowers, and thermostats.

about.headline: Your Trusted Auto Repair Partner in Dallas
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality auto repair services that keep our customers safe and satisfied.
story: Solutions Auto Repair was founded on the belief that car owners deserve transparent, reliable service. Our founder, a master technician with over 15 years of experience, saw too many customers overcharged and underserved. So he built a shop where quality and integrity come first.
Today, we continue that tradition. Every technician is certified, every estimate is detailed, and every repair is backed by a warranty. We're proud to be a trusted name in Dallas auto repair.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We always tell you what your car needs — and what it doesn't.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-grade parts and follow manufacturer specifications.

coreValues.title: Customer Focus
coreValues.description: Your satisfaction is our priority. We communicate clearly and treat you with respect.

coreValues.title: Continuous Improvement
coreValues.description: We invest in training and equipment to stay ahead of automotive technology.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with Solutions Auto Repair
contact.subheadline: Call us or stop by for expert auto repair in Dallas.
